title: Jigsaw Chess
description: Mod that adds funny chess figures inspired by jigsaw things mod.
body:
![chess is chessing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b0267ef7a52085a591c0b7d1ae9f8386dac3f6a.jpeg)
This mod adds **funny** CHESS FIGURES to minecraft. Just figures. Use it somehow. I think you should play chess with them.

## [[Main mod]](https://modrinth.com/mod/jigsaw-things-2)

It's comfortable to move chess with **Carry on**, but if you haven't installed this mod, there is a Scoop. Thing allows you to instantly pick up chess figures.

Also there are crafting recipes to convert your pawns to other figures if they reach board's edge. And reverse recipes.



Now there are two sets, but there will be more(it's not).

# Purgen:
Purgen team

# Mr. Proper (AKA Mr. Clean):
Proper team
